LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-28-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER PETER LEE'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS' UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. GABRIEL LEE-SANCHEZ, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan (tel: 415-398-6000) for Petitioner Peter K. Lee.
No other appearances via Zoom videoconference.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PETER LEE's Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioners' unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
